output_preview: {"answer":"src/auth/queue.ts deduplicates refresh work per tenant so duplicate refresh requests for the same tenant coalesce into one refresh, while refreshes for different tenants can continue in parallel.","evidence":{"session_id":"ses_1e5353a66ffeOrr9rgdBrkEX4O","blob_id":"auth_queue","message_id":"msg_e1acac5ac001iGLTcRSrwsCahk"},"why_not_global_mutex":"A global mutex was rejected because auth_refresh_different_tenants_parallel showed unrelated tenants must not block each other.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["billing retry queue rationale","markdown parser onboarding/cache bug","FLAG_AUTH_QUEUE_ROLLBACK"]}
